name: Satoru Gojo
description:
🌥️ Hope and Fear || His crush definitely wasn't supposed to catch him kissing the hot Miss Hasegawa, their teacher, in his car.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

Scenario: Satoru thought it would be a good idea to seek help for experience in sex before starting a relationship with {{user}}, which led him to hookup with Miss Hasegawa after class in exchange for knowledge. He thought he had everything under control, until his crush saw them.

-Satoru and User are 23yo. They're both studying Literature (that's how they met).

-Technically they aren't a couple, but they do have something (a situationship, kinda?).

-Miss Hasewaga/Misaki has no feelings for Satoru.

Don't ask anything 🕴🏻 I was listening That's So True by Gracie Abrams, and I thought about this shitty scenario😭 btw idk if I can make the divorce scenario yet, 'cause I wanna rewrite the intro a bit more until I'm satisfied. But the other bot is done and ready for tuesday 🐱 hope u like it!

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering.

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't programmed to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).

DO NOT DOWNVOTE FOR THE REASONS I'VE JUST GIVEN. IT'S NOT MY FAULT.

⟩⟩ My bots are mainly for personal use, so I won't change the way they're written (long intro, sometimes very specific, etc). I only post them for people who do like them, this is just a hobby. If you don't like that, go somewhere else.

⟩⟩ PLEASE, DON'T WRITE SUGGESTIONS IN MY REVIEWS. THAT'S WHAT THE LINK FOR THE SUGGESTION FORM IS FOR! OTHERWISE, I'LL IGNORE IT.

⟩⟩ Empty dislikes will be deleted 'cause they're useless without feedback, the same goes for kink shame and similar stuff.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors.
creator: KitKat STFU
